title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Being by the water always makes me feel so happy and calm and I love swimming so I can't wait to live next to a beach. We've been decluttering our house and trying to get rid of a lot of things that we don't use anymore. We've been selling stuff on Dangan and trying to live a more minimalist lifestyle because we move and travel so much it's really stressful having so much stuff so we're trying to get rid of as much as possible and only keep the essentials. Before leaving Seoul, I also squeezed in one last trip to my hair salon. I've been going to the same hair salon for quite a while now so I'm going to miss it a lot. We didn't do too much to my hair but we touched up the roots, trimmed the ends a little bit and put in some toner. It's a bit darker than it was before but in the sun it brightens up a lot. It always feels nice getting a fresh haircut. I've also been trying to meet up with some friends to say goodbye before moving.

title: will / shall
examples: I'm very excited because we'll be closer to family there because my in-laws live in Changwon.
Anyway that's my little life update for now. I'm excited to go to Busan but I'm also feeling a little nostalgic saying goodbye to Seoul. Thanks so much for watching and I'll see you next time. Bye!

title: can / could / be able to
examples: Being by the water always makes me feel so happy and calm and I love swimming so I can't wait to live next to a beach. We've been decluttering our house and trying to get rid of a lot of things that we don't use anymore. We've been selling stuff on Dangan and trying to live a more minimalist lifestyle because we move and travel so much it's really stressful having so much stuff so we're trying to get rid of as much as possible and only keep the essentials. Before leaving Seoul, I also squeezed in one last trip to my hair salon. I've been going to the same hair salon for quite a while now so I'm going to miss it a lot. We didn't do too much to my hair but we touched up the roots, trimmed the ends a little bit and put in some toner. It's a bit darker than it was before but in the sun it brightens up a lot. It always feels nice getting a fresh haircut. I've also been trying to meet up with some friends to say goodbye before moving.

It's so catchy. I liked that movie but I especially love the soundtrack. I've also been listening to a lot of Justin Bieber because he just dropped a new album. I've been listening to the song Go Baby non-stop and it always gets stuck in my head. Life has been a little bit chaotic these days because of the move so I haven't done a great job at sticking to my routines but I still try to do yoga in the mornings. I've been practicing ashtanga yoga and it makes me feel amazing. I've definitely seen some improvements in my strength and flexibility. I've mentioned her before but I always follow Leslie Fightmasters yoga videos on YouTube. Once we move to Busan I can't wait to switch it up and go for runs on the beach. I want to enjoy the view while getting my workout in.

title: Passive (is done / was done)
examples: A few nights ago I met up with a group of friends and had dinner at a place called Gokyo. It was my first time ever trying the Korean-style rotisserie chicken and scorched rice. I really recommend this restaurant because not only was the food delicious but I also really liked the atmosphere there. I think it's normally an open-air restaurant but when we were there it was too hot outside so they closed everything off and had the acion. Speaking of the heat, it's been so brutal in Seoul these days. This heat wave is no joke. I've been staying inside a lot and blasting my ac so be safe everybody. Keep cool and stay hydrated. Since I've been spending a lot more time inside I've been on a bit of a movie kick. I recently went to the movies on a double date with our friends to see F1. It was really good and I love going to the movie theater. It was a feel-good movie. It was definitely inspirational and Brad Pitt did an amazing job of course. One of my favorite movies that I've watched recently is called Companion. It's a dark thriller about AI and there are so many twists and turns. I was on the edge of my seat the whole time. I was screaming at the TV. It's really good and I highly recommend it. If you've ever seen the series Black Mirror it kind of has a similar vibe to that. That's my favorite genre because it's quite deep and it makes me think about a lot of different things. While I've been cleaning and packing I've also been listening to a lot of music. One song that I have on repeat these days is Golden from the movie K-Pop Demon Hunters.
